name: OnAREthSDServerEventGroupStatusChangedIPv6
title: OnAREthSDServerEventGroupStatusChangedIPv6
syntax: void OnAREthSDServerEventGroupStatusChangedIPv6( dword serviceId, dword majorVersion, dword instanceId, dword eventGroupId, long status, byte newIpAddress[], dword newPort );
description: This callback function can be implemented in the CAPL program if a Service Server wants to be notified whenever a Subscriber is added.
This function is called when a Client executes a subscribe eventgroup command.

parameters.name: serviceId
parameters.description: ID of the service whose status has changed.

parameters.name: newIpAddress
parameters.description: IPv6 address via which the subscription was received.

parameters.name: newPort
parameters.description: Source port via which the subscription was received.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
